questions.question: countryLabel
questions.sparqlQuery: SELECT DISTINCT ?country ?[QUESTION] ?capital ?[ANSWER] WHERE { ?country wdt:P31 wd:Q6256 . ?capital wdt:P31 wd:Q5119 . ?country wdt:P36 ?capital . ?country rdfs:label ?[QUESTION] . ?capital rdfs:label ?[ANSWER] . FILTER(LANG(?[QUESTION])='[LANGUAGE]' && LANG(?[ANSWER])='[LANGUAGE]') }

statements.statement: En quelle année a eu lieu [QUESTION] ?

questions.question: eventLabel
questions.sparqlQuery: SELECT DISTINCT ?event ?[QUESTION] ?[ANSWER] WHERE { ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q1656682 . ?event wdt:P585 ?[ANSWER] . ?event rdfs:label ?[QUESTION] . FILTER(LANG(?[QUESTION])='[LANGUAGE]') }

statements.statement: Qui a formulé la loi de [QUESTION] ?
Wer hat das Gesetz von [QUESTION] formuliert?

questions.question: lawLabel
questions.sparqlQuery: SELECT DISTINCT ?law ?[QUESTION] ?scientist ?[ANSWER] WHERE { ?law wdt:P31 wd:Q59199015 . ?law wdt:P50 ?scientist . ?law rdfs:label ?[QUESTION] . ?scientist rdfs:label ?[ANSWER] . FILTER(LANG(?[QUESTION])='[LANGUAGE]' && LANG(?[ANSWER])='[LANGUAGE]') }

questions.question: constantLabel
questions.sparqlQuery: SELECT DISTINCT ?constant ?[QUESTION] ?[ANSWER] WHERE { ?constant wdt:P31 wd:Q81879 . ?constant wdt:P1181 ?[ANSWER] . ?constant rdfs:label ?[QUESTION] . FILTER(LANG(?[QUESTION])='[LANGUAGE]') }

statements.statement: ¿Quién ganó el Premio Nobel de [QUESTION] en [YEAR]?
Who won the Nobel Prize in [QUESTION] in [YEAR]?
Qui a remporté le prix Nobel de [QUESTION] en [YEAR] ?
Wer gewann den Nobelpreis für [QUESTION] im Jahr [YEAR]?

questions.question: nobelPrizeCategoryLabel
questions.sparqlQuery: SELECT DISTINCT ?nobelPrize ?[QUESTION] ?winner ?[ANSWER] WHERE { ?nobelPrize wdt:P31 wd:Q7191 . ?nobelPrize wdt:P166 ?winner . ?nobelPrize wdt:P585 ?[YEAR] . ?nobelPrize rdfs:label ?[QUESTION] . ?winner rdfs:label ?[ANSWER] . FILTER(LANG(?[QUESTION])='[LANGUAGE]' && LANG(?[ANSWER])='[LANGUAGE]') }
